channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Regal RD-05 Resonator Acoustic Bass w/ Pickup - subburst — $675
item.description:
$675 · Excellent · Zac 's Gear

Regal RD-05 Acoustic / Electric Resonator Bass


Beautiful bass! Spruce top, mahogany back and sides - US made aluminum cone and spider bridge resonates bass notes with clarity.


Pro set up, plays great, and has really nice acoustic volume. Much better projection than the typical acoustic bass in my opinion.


The pickup sounds sweet- tone is somewhere between an electric and upright bass.


Excellent shape, great player. One small ding on the top, as barely visible in photos, but otherwise pristine.


These electric / acoustic reso basses are hard to find! This is one of the older line featuring electronics- don't confuse it with the re-issue... Regal just recently re-made these basses, but they lack the pick-up.


Very high quality $200 hard case in nice shape included.

item.title: Spector EURO4CLMBL EURO4 Classic Electric Bass. Sold Metallic Blue — $3,059.99
item.description:
$3,059.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro Classic series takes inspiration from the Spector basses that took the world by storm in the 1980's. With their unique silhouette and unmistakable sound, these basses became the choice of the most recognizable bass players of their era.

Euro Classic basses feature weight-relieved North American Maple body wings, three-piece maple neck-thru construction, a rosewood fingerboard with mother-of-pearl inlays, and professional grade Spector hardware. All models in the Euro Classic family feature a 34" scale length and a complete electronics package from EMG. 4-string models feature the "reverse" P/J pickup configuration, while the 5-strings feature a J/J configuration.

Discover the sound that inspired a decade of legendary bass lines with the Euro Classic series.

- Body: Weight-relieved Maple body
- Neck: 3-piece Maple neck
- Fingerboard: 24 fret Rosewood fingerboard
- Inlays: Spector's signature Crown inlays
- Electronics: Complete EMG electronics package including active pickups & the BTS pre-amp
- Scale Length: 34"
- Hardware: Chrome
- Finish: Metallic Blue High Gloss Finish

item.title: Spector BANTAM4BCLH Bantam 4 Left Handed Electric Bass. Black Cherry Gloss — $2,624.99
item.description:
$2,624.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

Spector's Bantam 4 adds a new dimension of tone to the Euro Series with it's short-scale, lightweight design. The Bantam features a carefully chambered, Alder body features a beautifully figured Quilted Maple Top, a bolt-on Maple neck with Indian Rosewood fingerboard, EMG electronics, and professional grade Spector hardware.

Continuing a 40-year legacy of innovation and top-notch craftsmanship, Spector’s new Bantam 4 is a short-scale powerhouse that packs a serious punch. With a 30” scale length and a carefully chambered body, the Bantam is light and extremely comfortable to play. The Bantam features the classic NS body style that is fully carved and contoured to the player’s body using lightweight, chambered Alder and a gorgeous Quilted Maple top. The deep-inset bolt-on neck ensures the utmost resonance and projection, while providing an effortless playing experience with its perfectly carved neck profile and fast 22 fret Indian Rosewood fingerboard. The Bantam is loaded with two EMG 35DC pickups as well as an EMG BTS active EQ circuit, allowing for maximum versatility when paired with your favorite pedals and amp

item.title: Spector EURO4CSTBLK Euro 4 Custom Electric Bass Natural Black Burst — $3,699.99
item.description:
$3,699.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro CST draws inspiration from Spector's Woodstock, NY-based Custom Shop, tonewoods, electronics, and finish combinations never seen in the Euro Series.

Features:

- Elevate your Spector experience with the Euro CST lineup
- Exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation
- Figured Poplar Burl Top
- European Ash Body
- 3-pc Maple Neck
- Neck-thru construction
- 24 fret Ebony fingerboard
- Laminated Abalone Crown inlays
- Active EMG X Series Pickups
- Spector Legacy Preamp

Each Euro CST instrument is meticulously crafted using premium materials, featuring a striking, highly figured Poplar Burl top, a resonant European Ash body, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck paired with an Ebony fingerboard adorned with laminated Abalone Crown inlays. These basses are equipped with a lightweight aluminum bridge for precise and reliable intonation. Premium active EMG X Series pickups deliver the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that defines the Spector sound. Spector is proud to offer the Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro CST range. Developed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics, this preamp captures the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings with added versatility.

Top Wood: European Poplar Burl
Body Wood: European Ash with a slice of Walnut
Neck Wood: 3-piece Maple with Graphite Rods inside for additional strength
Fretboard: Ebony
Number of Frets: 24
Inlays: Laminated Abalone Crowns
Nut: Brass
Nut Width: 1.64"
Scale: 34"
Neck Thickness at 1st Fret: .82"
Neck Thickness at 12th Fret: .93"
Controls: Volume, Blend, Treble Cut/Boost, Bass Cut/Boost
Pickups: Active EMG P/J X Series Set
Pickup Configuration: P/J
Preamp System: Spector Legacy Preamp by Darkglass
Hardware: Black & Gold
Bridge: Aluminum Locking w/ Brass Saddles
Tuners: Spector Die-Cast
Finish: Gloss
Strings: D'Addario XL Nickel

item.title: Spector EURO4CSTVLT Euro 4 Custom Electric Bass. Natural Violet Burst — $3,699.99
item.description:
$3,699.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro 4 Custom Electric Bass from Spector offers serious bassists a premium instrument with exceptional tone and playability. Handcrafted with a figured poplar burl top, European ash body and 3-piece North American maple neck for resonant sound and rock-solid stability. Active EMG X Series pickups provide clarity and punch, while the Spector Legacy preamp lets you shape your tone.

Premium Build for Superior Sound

The Euro 4 Custom's carefully selected tonewoods produce the rich, full sound that Spector basses are known for. The figured poplar burl top adds visual interest, with the European ash body providing balanced warmth and clarity. The 3-piece North American maple neck is reinforced for stability and topped with an ebony fingerboard for smooth playability. An ebony fingerboard provides a smooth surface, while laminated abalone crown inlays add visual flair. Overall, the premium tonewoods result in an instrument with exceptional sustain and projection.

Versatile Electronics for Your Signature Sound

EMG X Series pickups capture every nuance of your technique with exceptional fidelity and zero noise. The Spector Legacy preamp, developed with Darkglass Electronics, provides the classic Spector growl along with enhanced control over your tone. Choose between active and passive modes, then dial in the perfect blend of lows, mids and highs. A 3-band EQ, volume control and pickup pan let you tailor your sound for any genre or venue. Find your voice with the Euro 4 Custom's flexible electronics.

Premium Feel and Playability

The Euro 4 Custom's fast maple neck and 24-fret ebony fingerboard provide a familiar feel for experienced players. Grover tuners keep your instrument in tune through the most demanding performances. A lightweight aluminum bridge ensures accurate intonation for optimal playability up and down the neck. Whatever style you play, this bass gives you the premium feel and fluid playability that brings out your creative best.

Series

  • Model: Euro CST

Body

  • Top material: Figured poplar burl
  • Body material: European ash

Neck

  • Material: 3-piece North American maple
  • Construction: Neck-thru

Fingerboard

  • Material: Ebony
  • Fret size: Not specified
  • Number of frets: 24
  • Position inlays: Laminated abalone crown

Electronics

  • Controls: Spector Legacy preamp (developed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics)

Hardware

  • Bridge: Lightweight aluminum

Other

  • Strings: 4
  • Case/gig bag: Gig bag included (SSGB)

item.title: Spector EURO4DWAMB Doug Wimbish Euro 4 Signature Model Electric Bass. Amber Gloss — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

Experience Doug Wimbish's iconic 1987 NS-2 with this Spector DW Euro 4! With specifications taken directly from Doug's 1987 NS-2, this model has been carefully specified to match the unique properties of Doug's instrument, including a slim neck carve, narrow nut width, distinct pickup locations, and custom-wound EMG pickups, voiced alongside Doug's originals.

The Doug Wimbish Euro 4 Signature Model features maple body wings with genuine figured maple tops, rosewood fingerboard with mother of pearl crown inlays, gold Spector hardware, and Spector's recently developed Legacy Preamp which offers the classic, 1980s inspired 2-band EQ.

Features:

- Doug Wimbish Euro 4-string Signature Model
- Maple Body with Genuine Figured Maple Top
- High Gloss Finish with 34" Scale
- 24 Fret Rosewood Fingerboard
- Mother of Pearl Crown Inlays
- Spector Legacy Preamp with 2-Band Eq
- Custom-Wound EMG Vintage Correct Doug Wimbish P/J Style Pickups

Body Material: Maple with Wings
Top Material: Genuine Figured Maple
Construction: Set Neck
Finish: High Gloss
Fret Count: 24
Fingerboard: Rosewood
Neck Profile: Slim DW Custom with Neck Carve
Scale Length: 34"
Nut Width: Narrow 1.5"
Inlays: Mother of Pearl Crown
Electronics: Spector Legacy Preamp - 1980s Inspired 2-Band Eq
Controls: Master Volume, Pickup Blend, Bass Cut/Boost, Treble Cut/Boost
Pickups: Custom-Wound EMG Vintage Correct Doug Wimbish P/J Style with Emg Logo and Voicing
Hardware: Spector Gold
String Spacing: 19mm

item.title: Spector EURO4LXBHMM Euro 4 LX Bolt-On Electric Bass. Haunted Moss — $2,999.99
item.description:
$2,999.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade electronics and hardware. Players can now choose between neck-thru and bolt-on construction in the Euro LX range.

Features:

- Exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation
- European Flame Maple Top
- European Alder Body
- 3-pc Maple Neck
- Bolt-on construction
- 24 fret Rosewood fingerboard
- Mother of Pearl Crown inlays
- Active EMG Pickups
- Spector Legacy Preamp

Each Euro LX bass, regardless of construction, is crafted using premium materials, including a European Alder body, figured European Maple top, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck combined with a Rosewood fingerboard for strength, stability, and sustain. These basses are then outfitted with a lightweight, aluminum bridge for spot-on, reliable intonation. Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.

Spector is proud to offer the Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro LX range. This preamp was designed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics to deliver the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings over the years.

Rediscover the Spector experience with the Euro LX lineup.

item.title: Spector EURO4LXBURST Euro 4 LX Electric Bass. cNatural Sunburst Matte — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro4LX offers all of the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. The extremely comfortable, fully carved body is crafted from carved European alder body and is topped off a USA figured maple top. A 3 piece maple neck runs through the entire length of the instrument and features a 24 fret rosewood fingerboard with Spector's signature Crown inlays. Outfitted with a lightweight, zinc brass alloy bridge and nut, an active EMG P/J set of pickups and Spector's coveted Tone Pump active tone circuit, Euro4LX basses are equipped to hold down the low-end on the world's biggest stages.

- Body: Carved European alder body with a USA figured maple top and a slice of Walnut
- Neck: 3 piece maple neck
- Frets: 24 fret rosewood fingerboard with Spector's signature Crown inlays
- Pickups: Passive, an active EMG P/J set of pickups; Spector Tone Pump active tone circuit
- Finish: Black Cherry High Gloss Finish
- Hardware: Gold Hardware

item.title: Spector EURO4LXIAN50WH 50th Anniversary Judas Priest Ian Hill Electric Bass — $3,059.99
item.description:
$3,059.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

Ian Hill has been holding down the low-end for the legendary Judas Priest for 50 years. To celebrate 50 years of uncompromising metal anthems, Ian’s signature bass now features updated specifications. His name is synonymous with classic heavy metal and his signature Spector is carefully crafted to provide his legendary tone to all bassists.

The Euro4 Ian Hill is reminiscent of an 80’s era Spector with solid Maple body wings, a 3-piece maple neck, Rosewood fingerboard with a custom Judas Priest 50th anniversary inlay, premium electronics and gold hardware. The neck profile on the Euro4 Ian Hill has been carefully tapered to Ian’s specifications, resulting in a slimmer shape that’s sleek and comfortable. When it comes to reproducing the countless classic tones in the Judas Priest catalog, Ian relies on a single EMG P pickups and a proprietary Spector TonePump active tone circuit. Together, this electronics package delivers enough power and versatility to cut through any mix. The Euro4 Ian Hill is the perfect choice for die-hard fans of Judas Priest, or bassists looking for an instrument that will provide both classic and cutting tones.

item.description:

The Euro RST series brings Spector’s classic design into the modern era with updated tonewoods, enhanced electronics and a fresh palette of exclusive stain options. Neck-through construction has long been central to the Spector design and the Euro RST takes this concept to the next level with a three-piece roasted maple neck and fingerboard. The roasting process not only gives this design a distinct look, but offers enhanced stability and rigidity. This perfectly tempered tonewood is paired with a uniquely figured flame maple top and Empresswood back for striking looks, resonance and lightweight performance. For electronics, Euro RST models are loaded with Aguilar Super Double pickups and OBP-2 pre-amps for an added mid-range focus that’s sure to cut through any mix. Features

  • Roasted maple neck

item.title: Spector EURO5BKCL Euro 5 Classic 5 String Electric Bass. Solid Black Gloss — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro Classic series takes inspiration from the Spector basses that took the world by storm in the 1980’s. With their unique silhouette and unmistakable sound, these basses became the choice of the most recognizable bass players of their era.

Euro Classic basses feature weight-relieved North American Maple body wings, three-piece maple neck-thru construction, a rosewood fingerboard with mother-of-pearl inlays, and professional grade Spector hardware. All models in the Euro Classic family feature a 34” scale length and a complete electronics package from EMG. 4-string models feature the “reverse” P/J pickup configuration, while the 5-strings feature a J/J configuration. When it comes to looks, there are two new distinct finishes to choose from: Metallic Gold and Metallic Blue, each with chrome hardware. Discover the sound that inspired a decade of legendary bass lines with the Euro Classic series.

item.title: Spector EURO5CSTNAT Euro 5 Custom 5 String Electric Bass. Natural Gloss — $3,799.99
item.description:
$3,799.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro CST draws inspiration from our Woodstock, NY-based Custom Shop, introducing all-new tonewoods, electronics, and finish combinations never seen in the Euro Series.

The Euro CST draws inspiration from our Woodstock, NY-based Custom Shop, introducing all-new tonewoods, electronics, and finish combinations never seen in the Euro Series. Each Euro CST instrument is meticulously crafted using premium materials, featuring a striking, highly figured Poplar Burl top, a resonant European Ash body, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck paired with an Ebony fingerboard adorned with laminated Abalone Crown inlays. These basses are equipped with a lightweight aluminum bridge for precise and reliable intonation. Premium active EMG X Series pickups deliver the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that defines the Spector sound.? Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro CST range. Developed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics, this preamp captures the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings with added versatility. Elevate your Spector experience with the all-new Euro CST lineup.

  • Figured Poplar Burl Top; European Ash Body
  • 3-pc Maple Neck; Neck-thru construction
  • 24 fret Ebony fingerboard; Laminated Abalone Crown inlays
  • Active EMG X Series Pickups; Spector Legacy Preamp
  • Natural Black Burst Gloss Finish

item.title: Spector EURO5CSTRED Euro 5 Custom 5 String Electric Bass. Natural Red Burst Gloss — $3,799.99
item.description:
$3,799.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro 5 Custom Electric Bass from Spector offers serious bassists a premium instrument with exceptional tone and playability. Handcrafted with a figured poplar burl top, European ash body and 3-piece North American maple neck for resonant sound and rock-solid stability. Active EMG X Series pickups provide clarity and punch, while the Spector Legacy preamp lets you shape your tone.

Premium Build for Superior Sound

The Euro 5 Custom's carefully selected tonewoods produce the rich, full sound that Spector basses are known for. The figured poplar burl top adds visual interest, with the European ash body providing balanced warmth and clarity. The 3-piece North American maple neck is reinforced for stability and topped with an ebony fingerboard for smooth playability. An ebony fingerboard provides a smooth surface, while laminated abalone crown inlays add visual flair. Overall, the premium tonewoods result in an instrument with exceptional sustain and projection.

Versatile Electronics for Your Signature Sound

EMG X Series pickups capture every nuance of your technique with exceptional fidelity and zero noise. The Spector Legacy preamp, developed with Darkglass Electronics, provides the classic Spector growl along with enhanced control over your tone. Choose between active and passive modes, then dial in the perfect blend of lows, mids and highs. A 3-band EQ, volume control and pickup pan let you tailor your sound for any genre or venue. Find your voice with the Euro 5 Custom's flexible electronics.

Premium Feel and Playability

The Spector Euro 5 Custom's fast maple neck and 24-fret ebony fingerboard provide a familiar feel for experienced players. Grover tuners keep your instrument in tune through the most demanding performances. A lightweight aluminum bridge ensures accurate intonation for optimal playability up and down the neck. Whatever style you play, this bass gives you the premium feel and fluid playability that brings out your creative best.

Series

  • Model: Euro CST

Body

  • Body material: European ash

  • Construction: Neck-thru

item.title: Spector EURO5LXBBRST Euro 5 LX Bolt-On 5 String Electric Bass. Natural Sunburst Matte — $3,099.99
item.description:
$3,099.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade electronics and hardware.

The Euro LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade electronics and hardware. For the first time ever, players can now choose between neck-thru and bolt-on construction in the Euro LX range. Each Euro LX bass, regardless of construction, is crafted using premium materials, including a European Alder body, figured European Maple top, and a 3-piece North American Maple neck combined with a Rosewood fingerboard for strength, stability, and sustain. These basses are then outfitted with a lightweight, aluminum bridge for spot-on, reliable intonation. Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for. Spector is proud to offer the all-new Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro LX range. This new preamp was designed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics to deliver the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings over the years. The newly revised Euro LX range is available in four distinct, hand-rubbed stains, including Transparent Black, Natural Sunburst, Haunted Moss, and Nightshade. Each of these enchanting colors features a durable and comfortable matte finish. Rediscover the Spector experience with the all-new Euro LX lineup.

  • European Flame Maple Top; European Alder Body
  • 3-pc Maple Neck; Bolt-on construction
  • 24 fret Rosewood fingerboard; Mother of Pearl Crown inlays
  • Active EMG Pickups; Spector Legacy Preamp

item.title: Spector EURO5RSTSDGL Euro 5 RST 5 String Electric Bass. Sundown Glow Matte — $3,599.99
item.description:
$3,599.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro 5 LX offers all the features that have made the Spector name famous around the globe. Inspired by the iconic NS-2, Euro LX basses feature a fully carved and contoured body, high-grade tonewoods, and professional-grade electronics and hardware. For the first time ever, players can choose between neck-thru and bolt-on construction in the Euro LX range.

Features:

- Exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation
- European Flame Maple Top
- European Alder Body
- 3-pc Maple Neck
- Bolt-on construction
- 24 fret Rosewood fingerboard
- Mother of Pearl Crown inlays
- Active EMG Pickups
- Spector Legacy Preamp

Each Euro LX bass, regardless of construction, is crafted using premium materials, including a European Alder body, figured European maple top, and a 3-piece North American maple neck combined with a rosewood fingerboard for strength, stability, and sustain. These basses are then outfitted with a lightweight, aluminum bridge for spot-on, reliable intonation. Premium active pickups from EMG provide the exceptional clarity, attack, and silent operation that Spector is known for.

Spector is proud to offer the Spector Legacy preamp for the Euro LX range. This preamp was designed in collaboration with Darkglass Electronics to deliver the classic 'Spector growl' heard on countless iconic recordings over the years.

The Euro LX range is available in four distinct, hand-rubbed stains, including Transparent Black, Natural Sunburst, Haunted Moss, and Nightshade. Each of these enchanting colors features a durable and comfortable matte finish.

Rediscover the Spector experience with the Euro LX lineup.

Top Wood: Flame Maple
Body Wood: European Alder with a slice of Walnut
Neck Assembly: Bolt-On Construction
Neck Wood: 3-piece Maple with Graphite Rods inside for additional strength
Fretboard: Rosewood
Number of Frets: 24

Nut: Brass
Nut Width: 1.81"

item.title: Spector EURO5RSTTRQTD Euro 5 RST 5 String Electric Bass. Turquoise Tide — $3,599.99
item.description:
$3,599.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro RST series brings Spector’s classic design into a new era with updated tonewoods, enhanced electronics, and a fresh palette of exclusive stain options.

Neck-through construction has long been central to the Spector design. The Euro RST takes this concept to the next level with a three-piece Roasted Maple neck & fingerboard, which not only gives this design a distinct look, but offers enhanced stability and rigidity. This perfectly tempered tonewood is paired with a uniquely figured Flame Maple top and Empresswood back, for striking looks, resonance, and lightweight performance.

For electronics, Euro RST models are loaded with Aguilar Super Double pickups and OBP-2 pre-amps for an added mid-range focus that’s sure to cut through any mix. These exciting basses are available in three all-new colors, Sienna Stain, Turquoise Tide, and Sundown Glow, each complemented with a matching headstock, and a soft matte finish that feels broken-in from day one.

item.title: Spector EURO5WHCL Euro 5 Classic 5 String Electric Bass. Solid White Gloss — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

The Euro Classic series takes inspiration from the Spector basses that took the world by storm in the 1980’s. With their unique silhouette and unmistakable sound, these basses became the choice of the most recognizable bass players of their era.

Euro Classic basses feature weight-relieved North American Maple body wings, three-piece maple neck-thru construction, a rosewood fingerboard with mother-of-pearl inlays, and professional grade Spector hardware. All models in the Euro Classic family feature a 34” scale length and a complete electronics package from EMG. 4-string models feature the “reverse” P/J pickup configuration, while the 5-strings feature a J/J configuration. When it comes to looks, there are two new distinct finishes to choose from: Metallic Gold and Metallic Blue, each with chrome hardware. Discover the sound that inspired a decade of legendary bass lines with the Euro Classic series.

item.title: Spector ICONNC4FB Icon NC-4 Frank Bello Electric Basd — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Factory

Frank Bello, best known as the bassist of New York’s legendary thrash metal pioneers Anthrax, has joined forces with Spector basses to develop an all-new instrument. Dubbed the NC-4 Frank Bello, this bass is inspired by both Spector’s rich history and iconic American bolt-on bass design. With its refined shape, radiused top, and uniquely contoured neck heel, the NC-4 is a player’s dream, offering a nimbler and more playable approach to the classic bolt-on platform. Carefully designed with Frank, his NC-4 showcases a stunning metallic purple finish named Tina Rose, in honor of his mother and grandmother who supported his dream of playing music for a living. Completed with a matching head­stock and complimenting purple acrylic block fingerboard inlays.

The NC-4 Frank Bello is crafted from the combination of an Alder body and a 1-piece Maple neck with a Maple fingerboard. When combined, these timeless tonewoods offer the perfect blend of warmth, brightness, and clarity, making it the perfect choice for Frank’s massive and memorable bass lines. The neck itself offers a slim, yet comfortable profile modeled after some of Frank’s most cherished vintage instruments for a “just right” feel. When it comes to electronics, Frank prefers to keep it simple with his signature EMG P/J set and a straightforward control layout with two volume controls and a master tone control. This effective control set allows players to blend and taper their tone quickly and easily. Finished off with vintage-inspired chrome tuners and a modern fully adjustable bridge, the NC-4 Frank Bello is ready to bring the noise on the world’s biggest stages.

item.title: Ibanez SRAS7-CBS Bass Ashula 2023 - Present - Cosmic Blue Starburst — $1,000
item.description:
$1,000 · Excellent · Orion

The SRAS7 is a seven string hybrid fretted/fretless Soundgear series solid body electric bass model re-introduced by Ibanez for 2023. It is also referred to as the Ashula SRAS7. It is produced in Indonesia as part of the Ibanez Bass Workshop line.

The SRAS7 features a poplar burl and ash top on a double-cutaway mahogany body bolted to a seven-piece maple, rosewood, and purpleheart neck. The fretboard consists of a fretless upper (bass) section made of rosewood and an 22-fret lower (treble) section made of purpleheart with offset pearloid stadium position markers. Components include 2 Super J pick-ups and an AeroSilk piezo for the fretless part of the instrument as well as Mono-Rail V bridges with 16mm string spacing and a walnut finger rest. A pick-up selector allows the user to switch between regular pick-ups, piezo, or mix.

item.title: LAG Sauvage BCE / Jumbo Cutaway Electro / Acoustic-Electric 4-String Bass / Green Guitars Series / 2309LT23160 — $794.20
item.description:
$794.20 · Brand New · JMUSIQUE

Carefully inspected and professionally set up by our guitar workshop, this instrument is a showroom model in like-new condition.

Lâg Deluxe gigbag, original box and all original accessories included.


LAG SAUVAGE-BCE Bass Cutaway Electro


  • Green Guitars Series
  • Jumbo Cutaway Electro-Acoustic Bass
  • Top: Solid Pale Brankowood
  • Back & Sides: Smoked Eucalyptus
  • Arched Back
  • Bridge: Black Brankowood
  • Bracing: X-Bracing
  • Finish: Satin
  • Neck: Khaya
  • Fingerboard: Black Brankowood
  • Fingerboard Radius: 350 mm (13.78")
  • Truss Rod: Dual-Action
  • Frets: 20 Medium Silver Nickel
  • Nut Width: 42 mm
  • Nut & Saddle: Compensated Black Graphite
  • Scale Length: 822 mm (32.36")
  • Electronics: Stage-Lâg Preamp (Volume, 3-Band EQ, Phase, Notch Filter, Built-In Tuner)
  • Machine Heads: Die-Cast
  • Hardware: Black
  • Factory Strings: Bronze 40-95


A true icon of French guitar making, Lâg has built an outstanding reputation by combining distinctive design, impeccable craftsmanship and exceptional value for money. With the Sauvage Series, the brand offers a modern vision of acoustic instruments by pairing environmentally responsible construction with refined lutherie. Sustainable alternative tonewoods, natural satin finishes and meticulous attention to detail come together to create instruments that are as visually striking as they are musically inspiring.


The Sauvage BCE perfectly embodies this philosophy. From the very first notes, this electro-acoustic bass impresses with its build quality, playing comfort and, above all, its remarkable acoustic performance. While many acoustic basses struggle to produce enough volume without amplification, the Sauvage BCE stands out thanks to its truly exceptional projection. Its generously sized jumbo body with an arched back, combined with a solid Pale Brankowood top, delivers an impressive amount of natural volume, allowing you to play comfortably unplugged, whether practicing alone or performing alongside other musicians without immediately needing an amplifier. This outstanding projection makes it one of the most convincing acoustic basses available in its class.


The combination of the solid top with the smoked eucalyptus back and sides produces a rich, deep and beautifully balanced tone. The lows are full and well-defined, the midrange is warm and articulate, while the highs remain clear and focused, providing excellent note definition across the entire frequency range. Whether accompanying acoustic guitars, practicing at home or performing in intimate acoustic settings, the Sauvage BCE consistently delivers excellent dynamics and an exceptionally natural voice.


The Khaya neck offers a smooth and comfortable playing experience, while the Black Brankowood fingerboard provides an excellent feel under the fingers. The cutaway ensures effortless access to the upper frets, and the instrument feels perfectly balanced whether played seated or standing. The craftsmanship is exemplary throughout, with the elegant satin finish highlighting the natural beauty of the wood grain and giving the instrument a refined, contemporary yet organic appearance.


Plugged in, the Sauvage BCE reveals even greater versatility thanks to the comprehensive Stage-Lâg preamp. Featuring master volume, a three-band EQ, notch filter for effective feedback suppression, phase switch and a built-in tuner, it offers everything needed for live performance or studio recording. The amplified sound remains faithful to the instrument's natural acoustic character, delivering a detailed, dynamic and highly musical tone.


With the Sauvage BCE, Lâg proves that an electro-acoustic bass can be elegant, environmentally conscious and genuinely high-performing. Its exceptional unplugged projection, refined craftsmanship, outstanding playing comfort and versatile electronics make it one of the strongest contenders in its category. An inspiring instrument that will appeal equally to dedicated acoustic bass players and anyone looking for a bass capable of delivering a true, full-bodied bass sound—even without amplification.

item.title: Duesenberg Alliance Chris Chaney Bass - Gold Sparkle — $2,709.92
item.description:
$2,709.92 · Brand New · Klundert Music

During his time with Jane's Addiction and while currently on tour with AC/DC, Chris Chaney is continuously proving to be the deep rhythm power-house every band needs.

This long-scale solid Alder body Alliance Series is packed with innovative features like our new Grand Duplex Bass Pickups and large anodized aluminium pickguard, all while retaining a sleek and elegant package.
 Custom laser-etched control knobs and neck plate, as well as custom fretboard inlays at the 12th fret make this a truly unique low-frequency workhorse.

The Alliance Series Chris Chaney features a solid Alder body with smooth body contours and a bolt-on long-scale Maple neck with Rosewood fretboard. Custom Duesenberg Grand Duplex Bass pickups deliver a clear and transparent tone while still providing the deep bottom end frequencies required for a bass. A plek’d fretboard guarantees perfectly level frets. This is the basis for Duesenberg’s fret polishing and setup work all done by hand that eventually makes their instruments play like nothing you have ever played before.

item.title: LTD B‑204SM Natural Satin OCCASION — $559.42
item.description:
$559.42 · Very Good · Broc Music

La ESP LTD B‑204SM est une basse électrique quatre cordes conçue pour le studio et la scène. Elle possède un corps en frêne avec table en érable spalté, finition satinée mettant en valeur le grain du bois sans brillance. Le manche en cinq pièces érable/rosewood extra fin profil Thin U offre confort et stabilité. Le manche est collé par vissage (bolt‑on) et doté d'une touche en rosewood avec une touche radius de 400 mm et 24 frettes extra‑jumbo. Elle intègre des micros ESP SB‑4N au manche et SB‑4B au chevalet, ainsi qu’un égaliseur actif 3 bandes ABQ‑3 (basses, mediums, aigus) avec contrôles de volume et balance. Le chevalet string‑through ESP BB‑604 améliore la sustain, tandis que le bois léger et le contour Thin U réduisent la fatigue durant les longues sessions. Caractéristiques principales: - Corps en frêne avec table en érable spalté - Manche 5‑pièces érable/rosewood profil Thin U - Touche rosewood 24 frettes extra‑jumbo (400 mm radius) - Micros ESP SB‑4N (manche) et SB‑4B (chevalet) - Égaliseur actif 3 bandes ABQ‑3 (basses, mediums, aigus) avec volume et balance - Chevalet string‑through ESP BB‑604 - Finition satinée naturelle
